description: list-manage.com is associated with Mailchimp and is commonly used for Mailchimp-hosted links and list-management endpoints in email flows. Mailchimp provides marketing, transactional messaging, and open-commerce products for email, SMS, and commerce integrations.
summary: list-manage.com itself exposes no standalone developer surface; it is a Mailchimp-owned domain used with Mailchimp’s developer surfaces, which include the Marketing API, Transactional API, a Transactional MCP server, an Open Commerce GraphQL API pattern, and the Open Commerce CLI.
